title: V1.4 — sqlx compile-time macro migration + .sqlx/ workflow

metadata.description: Migrate all ~79 runtime sqlx::query() calls to compile-time checked macros (query!/query_as!/query_scalar!), establish .sqlx/ offline workflow, codify AGENTS.md convention. Spec: knowledge/sqlx-compile-time-migration-v1.md
commits: df6a293 chore(sqlx): initialize .sqlx offline workflow and reference database setup
8067f9c refactor(sqlx): migrate nexus-local-db to compile-time checked macros
2fc819c refactor(sqlx): migrate nexus-sync to compile-time checked macros
131f345 refactor(sqlx): migrate nexus-orchestration to compile-time checked macros
e85fb94 refactor(sqlx): migrate nexus42 and nexus42d to compile-time checked macros
6f217b4 chore(ci,docs): re-enable verify-sqlx-offline and codify sqlx compile-time macro convention
35f62f9 fix(sqlx): address all blocking QC findings from sqlx migration review
540b74f docs: add DATABASE_URL convention and .sqlx/ commit/ignore rules to AGENTS.md

gates.cargo_test: pass (385/386; 1 pre-existing auth test failure out of scope)

metadata.notes: All 5 batches complete. 97 .sqlx/ metadata files. All runtime queries have SAFETY comments. QC3+suggestions registered as residuals. QA pass on all 9 acceptance criteria. AGENTS.md updated with DATABASE_URL convention and .sqlx/ commit/ignore rules.
metadata.residual_summary: 5 low/nit items — deferred to V1.5, no blocking issues
